response.text:
FastFrame is enabled with Horizontal:FASTframe:STATE ON and Horizontal:FASTframe:COUNt, then you can check acquisition progress with ACQuire:NUMFRAMESACQuired?.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"FastFrame usage verified from retrieved SCPI commands: enable it with HORizontal:FASTframe:STATE ON, set the frame count with HORizontal:FASTframe:COUNt 2 (or your desired count), and query ACQuire:NUMFRAMESACQuired? to confirm frames collected.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[]}

actionsJson.summary: FastFrame usage verified from retrieved SCPI commands: enable it with HORizontal:FASTframe:STATE ON, set the frame count with HORizontal:FASTframe:COUNt 2 (or your desired count), and query ACQuire:NUMFRAMESACQuired? to confirm frames collected.
